faces.eat-term-color-bright-black: Face used to render bright black color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-red: Face used to render bright red color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-green: Face used to render bright green color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-yellow: Face used to render bright yellow color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-blue: Face used to render bright blue color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-magenta: Face used to render bright magenta color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-cyan: Face used to render bright cyan color text.
faces.eat-term-color-bright-white: Face used to render bright white color text.
faces.eat-term-bold: Face used to render bold text.
faces.eat-term-faint: Face used to render faint text.
faces.eat-term-italic: Face used to render italic text.
faces.eat-term-slow-blink: Face used to render slowly blinking text.
faces.eat-term-fast-blink: Face used to render rapidly blinking text.
faces.eat-shell-prompt-annotation-success: Face used in annotation to indicate the command has succeeded.
faces.eat-shell-prompt-annotation-running: Face used in annotation to indicate the command is running.
faces.eat-shell-prompt-annotation-failure: Face used in annotation to indicate the command has failed.

syntax.kw: Font Lock mode face used to highlight keywords.
syntax.bi: Font Lock mode face used to highlight builtins.
syntax.pp: Font Lock mode face used to highlight preprocessor directives.
syntax.fnd: Font Lock mode face used to highlight function names.
syntax.fnc: Font Lock mode face used to highlight function calls.
syntax.ty: Font Lock mode face used to highlight type and class names.
syntax.prop: Font Lock mode face used to highlight properties of an object.
syntax.con: Font Lock mode face used to highlight constants and labels.
syntax.num: Font Lock mode face used to highlight numbers.
syntax.str: Font Lock mode face used to highlight strings.
syntax.esc: Font Lock mode face used to highlight escape sequences in strings.
syntax.re: Font Lock mode face used to highlight regexp literals.
syntax.doc: Font Lock mode face used to highlight documentation embedded in program code.
syntax.cm: Font Lock mode face used to highlight comments.
syntax.cmd: Font Lock mode face used to highlight comment delimiters.
syntax.var: Font Lock mode face used to highlight variable names.
syntax.op: Font Lock mode face used to highlight operators.
syntax.punc: Font Lock mode face used to highlight punctuation characters.
